abilities.shortEffect: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

requiredCredits: PokéAPI contributors for the structured API data.

English source prose is preserved to avoid inventing translations of gameplay behavior.
